pageContext.name: Be@rbrick The Batman 1000%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom are proud to present the Be@rbrick The Batman 1000% Collectible Figure!  This figure stands at approximately 27.55' tall and features the Dark Knight himself, ready to fight crime all over Gotham City.  DC Comics fans don't miss your chance to add this Batman Be@rbrick to your collection today!
